name: Harvest Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together oil, egg, and squash in a bowl.
2. Add flour, baking powder, nutmeg, and cinnamon to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Gently fold in the chopped dates.
4. Scoop small spoonfuls of batter onto lightly oiled baking sheets.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes or until firm to the touch.
6. Remove from oven and cool on wire racks.
